abilities.effect: You cast *enfeeble*. After you cast the spell, if the target is enfeebled, it releases a 10-foot emanation that doesn’t include itself. Each creature in that area must attempt a Fortitude save as if targeted by enfeeble, but gets an outcome one degree of success better than it rolled.
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text: Cracks and healed fractures spiderweb the shaft of this bone wand, worsening each time the wand is used. The bone's worn epiphysis forms the wand's pommel, and black leather wraps around the handle.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Wand
traits.text: A wand contains a single spell which you can cast once per day.
